title: The Indian Red Cross Society Act, 1920
full_text: The Indian Red Cross Society Act, 1920 भारतीय रेड क्रास सोसाइटी अधिनियम, 1920 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 192015 Act Number: 15 Enactment Date: 1920-03-20 Act Year: 1920 Short Title: The Indian Red Cross Society Act, 1920 Hindi Title: भारतीय रेड क्रास सोसाइटी अधिनियम, 1920 Long Title: An Act to constitute an Indian Red Cross Society. Section 4D. Powers and functions of the Chairman and Vice-Chairman. Section 4E. Powers of the President to supersede the Managing Body. Section 5. Power to make rules.
